debug_info.goal:
case refine_3
G : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : Group G
K : ℝ
inst✝ : DecidableEq G
A : Finset G
hA₀ : A.Nonempty
hA : ↑(A ^ 2).card ≤ K * ↑A.card
hK : 1 ≤ K
S : Finset G := {g ∈ A⁻¹ * A | ↑A.card / (2 * K) ≤ ↑(MulOpposite.op g • A ∩ A).card}
hS₁ : 1 ∈ S
hS₀ : S.Nonempty
hSA : S ⊆ A⁻¹ * A
hSsymm : S⁻¹ = S
hScard : ↑S.card ≤ K ^ 2 * ↑A.card
F : Finset G
hFA : F ⊆ A
hFcard : ↑F.card ≤ 2 * K
hASF : A ⊆ S * F
⊢ ∃ a ∈ A, ↑A.card / (2 * K) ≤ ↑(A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • S ^ 2).card

failed_attempts:
have hF₀ : F.Nonempty := nonempty_of_mul_nonempty_right (hA₀.mono hASF)
    obtain ⟨a, haF, ha⟩ := exists_le_of_sum_le hF₀ (fun x ↦ #(A ∩ op x • S))
    refine ⟨a, hFA haF, ?_⟩
    calc
      (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #A / #F := by gcongr; exact hFcard
      _ ≤ (∑ x ∈ F, #(A ∩ op x • S)) / #F := by
        gcongr
        norm_cast
        rw [← card_biUnion_le, ← biUnion_inter, biUnion_op_smul_eq_mul, inter_eq_left.mpr hASF]
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ op a • S) := ha
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ op a • S ^ 2) := by gcongr; exact subset_mul_right _ hS₁
